source: Krauss, Krail, and Axhausen (2022), Table 1 and paper-aligned assumptions

household_cars.note: The paper reports an average of 1 car per household but not the full distribution.

accessible_bikes.note: The paper reports an average of 2 accessible bikes per household but not the full distribution.

maas_subscription.note: The original paper includes MaaS subscription in the utility specification but the sample proportion is not reported in the main paper excerpt available here. A 10% incidence is used as a transparent placeholder assumption.
